title: [ExportVerilog] `disallowPackedStructAssignments` also needs to consider `hw.aggregate_constant`
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is a CIRCT tool bug in MLIR-to-Verilog lowering, not a SystemVerilog language issue. The issue describes incorrect Verilog emission behavior when hw.aggregate_constant is used, but provides no SV code snippet that can trigger or reproduce the bug.
